name: Myrion Orinthal
posting: Foreign Service Officer - Embassy, Galactic Assembly
bio: A commoner of House Telynar that was hired and appointed to the position of Foreign Service Officer for the Arandorë Eldainë Embassy to the Galactic Assembly.

serviceRecord.text: Appointed FSO to the Arandorë Eldainë Embassy to the Galactic Assembly

name: Talanor Lirathen
posting: Foreign Service Officer - Embassy, Galactic Assembly
bio: A commoner of House Sylvaris that was hired and appointed to the position of Foreign Service Officer for the Arandorë Eldainë Embassy to the Galactic Assembly.

serviceRecord.text: Appointed FSO to the Arandorë Eldainë Embassy to the Galactic Assembly

name: Halion Velár
bio: A clone officer that after graduating from the officer academy was assigned to a Command posting aboard the Cruiser Tirithal.

serviceRecord.text: Graduates from the officer academy and takes command of the Cruiser Tirithal
Makes first contact with the Dolls

name: Vaerion Calenarth
bio: A clone officer that after graduating from the officer academy was assigned to a Command posting aboard the Cruiser Calathorion.

serviceRecord.text: Graduates from the officer academy and takes command of the Cruiser Calathorion
Makes first contact with the Fyraxian Swarm
Makes first contact with the mysterious Guardians on an unknown world

name: Sylion Aurendal
bio: A noble of House Alarion that was nominated and chosen by the High King to be the Ambassador and Chief representative of the High Realm to the Galactic Assembly.

serviceRecord.text: Nominated Ambassador to the Galactic Assembly

name: Aelorion Alarion
posting: The Valarindë, First Councillor of the Valarindë
bio: Following a long line of High King's, Aelorion is the reigning Monarch of the High Realm and will continue to be for the foreseeable future.

serviceRecord.text: Coronation of High King Aelorion Alarion
